ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Continued To Aug-31-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Jun-30-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Gonzalez' motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within14 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $216.30 are to be paid within 14 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES

Off Calendar May-25-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-20-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
